ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or publisher of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the article covers */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main entity mentioned in the article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "reading_time" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time of the article in minutes */,
  "sentiment_summary" TEXT /* A summary of the overall sentiment of the article */,
  "is_breaking_news" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is breaking news */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the article was updated or modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is currently active or archived */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the topic */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the entity is sensitive */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the entity */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the sentiment scores belong to */,
  "anger" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of anger */,
  "disgust" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of disgust */,
  "fear" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of fear */,
  "joy" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of joy */,
  "sad" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of sadness */,
  "surprise" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of surprise */,
  "neutral" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of neutrality */,
  "positive" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of positivity */,
  "negative" REAL /* Score for the sentiment of negativity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentiment scores were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentiment scores were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
